CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. And Defendants Ross Stores, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nathan DeVries, of Yeroushalmi & Associates, Tel. 310.623.1926, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Julie Glazer, of Norton Rose Fulbright US LLP, Tel. 213.892.9200, for defendants, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: The Court required parties to appear. The matter was discussed. PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. And Defendants Ross Stores, Inc. is approved. The Court signs the order and consent judgment. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
